tasks.title: Multi-stage Dockerfile
tasks.why: Multi-stage — build vositalari yakuniy image'ga kirmaydi (kichik image).
steps: FROM alpine AS build  /  RUN echo 'echo built-app' > /app.sh

tasks.title: .dockerignore
tasks.why: Keraksiz fayllarni build kontekstига yubormaslik — tez, kichik, xavfsiz.
steps: Sinov fayllari:  echo kerakli > keep.txt && echo maxfiy > ignored.txt

tasks.title: Image hajmi
tasks.why: docker images — SIZE ustuni image hajmini ko'rsatadi.

tasks.title: Registry uchun tag
tasks.why: Registry uchun image nomi: registry/nom (masalan localhost:5000/app).
steps: alpine'ni registry nomi bilan tagla:  docker tag alpine localhost:5000/d19tag

tasks.title: Image tarixi (qatlamlar)
tasks.why: docker history — image qaysi qatlamlardan iborat va har biri hajmi.

tasks.title: Multi-stage qur va ishlat
tasks.why: Qurib ko'rasan: yakuniy image faqat natijaдан iborat (kichik).

tasks.title: .dockerignore ta'siri
steps: ig papkасида Dockerfile yoz:  FROM alpine  /  WORKDIR /app  /  COPY . .
Tekshir:  docker run --rm d19ig ls /app   (keep.txt bor, ignored.txt YO'Q)
tasks.expect: image ичида keep.txt bor, ignored.txt yo'q
tasks.check: docker run --rm d19ig ls /app 2>/dev/null | grep -q keep.txt && ! docker run --rm d19ig ls /app 2>/dev/null | grep -q ignored.txt

tasks.title: Lokal registry ishga tushir
tasks.why: registry:2 — o'zingning image ombori (Docker Hub'ning lokal versiyasi).

tasks.title: Registry'ga push
tasks.why: Image'ни registry'ga joylash — boshqa serverlar undan oladi.

tasks.title: Registry'дан pull
steps: Lokal nusxani o'chir:  docker rmi localhost:5000/d19small

tasks.title: O'zing: multi-stage image qur
tasks.why: Qadam YO'Q — bilimingni o'zing qo'lla. Mustaqil amaliyot — haqiqiy mahorat shu.
tasks.expect: work/solo/ да 2-bosqichli (multi-stage) Dockerfile yoz va undan 'd19solo' nomli image qur. (Maslahat: FROM ... AS build / FROM ... / COPY --from=build)

tasks.title: O'zing: registry'ga push qil
tasks.why: Qadam YO'Q — push jarayonini o'zing eslab bajar.
tasks.expect: 'd19solo' image'ni lokal registry (localhost:5000) ga tagla va push qil.

tasks.title: Kichik image qur
steps: Multi-stage Dockerfile yoz (build + alpine), 'd19proj' qur:  docker build -t d19proj .

tasks.title: Loyihani registry'ga joyla
tasks.why: Loyiha yakuni: optimallangan image'ни registry'ga push.
steps: docker tag d19proj localhost:5000/d19proj && docker push localhost:5000/d19proj

tasks.title: Kun xulosasi
steps: Multi-stage build image'ни nega kichik qilishini + registry nima uchun kerakligini ustozга ayt
